creator: mw@semihalf.com
text:
Hi!

Indeed. Due to include dependencies the PIE flag was enabled not only for the base system (src.opts.mk) but for all binaries, including ports (bsd.opts.mk). 

One thing that is to explicitly limit the change to base system only, which was requested in the review.

@emaste - what about failing ports. Should we attempt to fix them now or stop at what I mentioned above? If yes - how to proceed: try on our own, ask maintainers of each package?

Best regards,
Marcin
